meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Recon Village - Master Chen - Twitter Word Phrequency
meta.description: What you say can hurt you, but how? In this talk, I will take a deep dive into Twitter Word Phrequency analysis and the implications of the resulting data. I will cover data acquisition, curation, analysis, weaponization, and maybe even profit. What is revealed by everyday social media engagent? Predictive speech? Password lists? Automated trolling? Let's find out!
